summary: Audience recording (Ebel) praised as the best‑sounding source for set 2, but overall show details are unclear
review: The reviewer notes a cataloging glitch that lists the wrong date, yet confirms the audio is indeed from 8/17/91. They highlight the Ebel‑mic audience recording of the second set as the best‑sounding source available, while offering no commentary on the musical performance itself.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review; positive comment about second‑set audio quality but no information on performance, leading to a moderate overall rating with low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Ebel audience mic capture praised as the best‑sounding source for set 2; no further details on clarity or mix.
